name: Thron the Disciplined Angel
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>聖</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>座</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ざ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>天</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>てん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>嗣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ストン
name_jp_tl: Thton the Successor Angel to the Holy Throne
desc: If a monster(s) that was originally an EARTH Fairy is sent from your hand or field to the GY (except during the Damage Step): You can Special Summon this card from your hand. You can only use this effect of "Thron the Disciplined Angel" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If a monster(s) that was originally an EARTH Fairy is sent from your hand or field to the GY (except during the Damage Step): You can Special Summon this card from your hand. You can only use this effect of "Thron the Disciplined Angel" once per turn.
eff: If a monster(s) that was originally an EARTH Fairy is sent from your hand or field to the GY (except during the Damage Step): You can Special Summon this card from your hand. You can only use this effect of "Thron the Disciplined Angel" once per turn.

summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
